untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (Broadening Formations with right-angled/descending structure) requires visual chart analysis and is not expressible using only price/volume indicators. Yearly high proximity, throwback/pullback percentages, pattern height comparison, and upward volume trend qualifications cannot be reliably translated to mechanical rules without pattern detection library. Approximated entry with pivot breakout and volume confirmation, but this does not capture the true broadening formation geometry.
translation_notes: Entry: Attempted to approximate downward breakout from formation using pivot level breach with volume confirmation. Exit: Basic reversal using SMA_20 crossover as stop condition. Missing: (1) Broadening formation detection algorithm, (2) Yearly high proximity check, (3) Pattern height/width metrics, (4) Throwback/pullback percentage filtering, (5) Volume trend differentiation by market regime. The 23% average decline and 44-51% price target achievement rates are performance metrics, not actionable conditions. Author silent on success rates and stop placement limits mechanization.
